{
  Item1:
/// @generated
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: HashTable
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class MyData final {

    static constexpr char GetFirstChar(std::string_view str) { return str[0]; }
    static constexpr char GetLastChar(std::string_view str) { return str[str.length() - 1]; }
    static constexpr int32_t GetLength(std::string_view str) { return static_cast<int32_t>(str.length()); }

    struct e {
        std::string_view key;
        int8_t next;
        uint64_t hash_code;
        e(const std::string_view key, const int8_t next, const uint64_t hash_code)
           : key(key), next(next), hash_code(hash_code) {}
    };

    static constexpr std::array<int8_t, 2> buckets = {
        1, 2
    };

    inline static const std::array<e, 2> entries = {
        e(u8"test1", -1, 17837601492779536344ull), e(u8"test2", -1, 17837601488081284521ull)
    };

    static constexpr uint64_t get_hash(const std::string_view value) noexcept {
        uint64_t hash = 352654597;

        for (unsigned char ch : value)
            hash = (((hash << 5) | (hash >> 27)) + hash) ^ static_cast<uint32_t>(ch);

        return 352654597 + (hash * 1566083941);
    }

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const std::string_view key) noexcept {
        int32_t getLength;
        char getLastChar;
        char getFirstChar;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength > 5))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getLastChar = GetLastChar(key);
        if ((getLastChar > 50))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getFirstChar = GetFirstChar(key);
        if ((getFirstChar > 116))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((getFirstChar < 116))
        {
         return false;
        }


        const uint64_t hash = get_hash(key);
        const size_t index = hash % 2;
        int8_t i = static_cast<int8_t>(buckets[index] - 1);

        while (i >= 0) {
            const auto& entry = entries[i];

            if (entry.hash_code == hash && entry.key == key)
                return true;

            i = entry.next;
        }

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 2;
    static constexpr int32_t min_key_length = 5;
    static constexpr int32_t max_key_length = 5;
    static constexpr bool has_number = true;
    static constexpr bool has_uppercase = false;
    static constexpr bool has_lowercase = true;
    static constexpr bool has_symbol = false;
    static constexpr bool has_whitespace = false;
};
,
  Item2: 
}
